title: DACH consultancy thought leadership (DE)
rationale: German-language consulting authority play (no direct CTA, goal=authority). Tests DE locale + soft funnel handling + LinkedIn-only channel reasoning.
notes: No CTA → cta_strength absent → conversion_readiness must be capped at 70. Authority goal expected.
